steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The key clue is “even as they evolve” — traditional forms remain recognizable despite change. The blank describes forms that do not share this quality, blending elements to make something unconventional.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: “Amorphous” means lacking fixed or definite form — this captures the idea of borrowing from multiple forms to create something without clear boundaries. The other three either contradict this (customary implies traditional), describe something unrelated to form (neutral), or reverse the relationship (dispersed suggests spread, not shapelessness). That matches choice B — B is correct.
